description_long: This cash register features a robust rectangular body with a blue exterior and a slanted beige control surface. The top panel includes a numeric keypad with several rows of square buttons, a display screen, and a red section that likely houses a receipt printer slot. A prominent vertical pole supports a red customer-facing display at the back, which appears to show transaction information. The front of the register has a large red cash drawer with a round knob, currently shown open and divided into compartments for organizing bills and coins. The overall design is utilitarian, with clear separations between the functional areas and a combination of metal and plastic materials.
description: A blue and beige cash register with a numeric keypad, display screen, red cash drawer, and a raised customer display on a pole.
description_view_0: Side view showing the slanted control panel, numeric keypad, display screen, and the open cash drawer extending outward.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the open red cash drawer, keypad, and the vertical pole supporting the customer display.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a clear look at the pole-mounted display and the arrangement of the control panel and cash drawer.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the register, the customer display, and the top of the cash drawer compartment.
attribute_keypad_layout: 12-key numeric grid with three rows and four columns, labeled with numbers and function keys
